Package Commands

package Commands

    Description

    Command
    parent class for all commands

    ExecuteScriptCommand
    used to execute scripts on client
    ExitCommand
    used to close client
    FindIdCommand
    helping class used for update id command
    HelpCommand
    used to get list of all commands
    HistoryCommand
    used to get last 10 commands
    InfoCommand
    used to get info about collection
    PrintFieldAscendingMpaaRatingCommand
    used to get all mpaa rating in ascending order
    RemoveAnyByUsaBoxOfficeCommand
    used to remove first element by its usaboxoffice
    RemoveByIdCommand
    used to remove movie by its id
    ShowCommand
    used to print all collection items sorts them by their distance from (0,0)
    UpdateIdCommand
    used to replace item with given id
